fact_nuggets.text: Aftermath (Japanese: Induced Explosion) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Causes the Pokemon to explode upon fainting. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD When the Pokemon takes huge damage from a contact move like Tackle or Scratch, it counterattacks to damage the enemy! If the Pokemon is hit by an explosion, it will explode, too!

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with this Ability faints due to damage from a move that makes contact , the attacking Pokemon takes damage equal to of its own maximum HP. This Ability will not activate if a Pokemon with Damp is on the field or if the Pokemon was knocked out by a move that dealt direct damage . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Aftermath has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with this Ability faints due to damage from a move that makes contact , the attacking Pokemon takes damage equal to of its own maximum HP. This Ability will not activate if a Pokemon with Damp is on the field or if the Pokemon was knocked out by a move that dealt direct damage .
Damages the attacker for 1/4 its max HP when knocked out by a contact move.
